version_description: This interpretation as a simplification of the chords it includes a capo on 1 and the repetitive riff.

versions.version_description: This is a fingerstyle/ chord arrangement of the video version of the song. The melody and bass notes are provided feel free to flesh out the finger picking as the song develops. I wrote the tabs with a capo on the first fret but still in reference to the nut so just use the fingerings as though you were playing open.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song:    Enjoy The Silence
Artists: Depeche Mode
Album:   Violator (Remastered) 1990
URL:     https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Zxx3_wOCoU
         https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enjoy_the_Silence
Tempo:   Adagio
Tuning:  Standard

Capo 1

INTRO:
[Keyboard swells, rolling Bass notes, then Drum accents, 
followed by Lead Guitar]

[tab]Riff #1: (on 3rd Bar)
e||—————————————-————————————-——|———————————-—————-———————-——| [/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]||—————————————-—————————-—————|—————————————-—————-———————-|
[ch]G[/ch]||————————-—————————————————-——|———————————————————-——-——-——|
D||———-10-10^10-12-13—-—10^10-8—|—-—10-10^10-12-13—-—10^10-8—|
A||——10———————————————10————————|—10———————————————10—————-——|[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]||—————————————-—————————————-—|————————————————————-————-—-|

[tab]e||—————————————-—————————-—————|—————————————-—————-———————-| [/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]||—————————————-—————————-—————|—————————————-—————-———————-|
[ch]G[/ch]||—————————————-—————————-—————|—————————————-—————-———————-|
D||———6—6^6-5——-8-8^8-6—————————|———6—6^6-5——-8-8^8-6————————|
A||——6—————————8——-—————————-———|——6—————————8————-————-————-|[/tab]
[ch]E[/ch]||—————————————-—————————-—————|—————————————-—————-———————-|


|[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] | x6


VERSE 1:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Words like violence,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Break the silence.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come crashing in,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Into my little world.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Painful to me,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Pierce right through me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Can't you understand,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Oh my little girl.[/tab]


CHORUS 1:
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
All I ever wanted,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
All I ever needed.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]D/A[/ch]
Is here in my arms,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Words are very unnecessary,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
They can only do harm.[/tab]

[Keyboards, Drum Snares, followed by Lead Guitar]
:: Riff #1 ::
|[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] | x4

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
To be broken.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Feelings are intense,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Words are trivial.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Pleasures remain,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
So does the pain.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Words are meaningless,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And forgettable.[/tab]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
All I ever wanted,[/tab]

CODA:
[Lead Guitar]
:: Riff #1 :: x3
[tab]|[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] | x12
:: Riff #1 :: x3 [Keyboard Horns, over][/tab]
|[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] | x12


[End]


NOTES.
1.  Depeche Mode play this live in Cm.  This interpretation is a simplification of the chords it 
includes a capo on 1 and the repetitive riff.
2.  “…In 1990, a promotional video for "Enjoy the Silence" was shot by French TV (for the TV Show 
"Champs-Élysées" with Michel Drucker) featuring Depeche Mode lip-synching the song while standing atop 
the World Trade Center at the WTC rooftop World observatory, south Tower #2. …”  
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Enjoy_the_Silence
